descriptions: YPG International Battalion is part of YPG.
edges.evidence_quote: the International Anti-Fascist Battalion was renamed to the YPG International Battalion and became a part of the YPG.

'Ndrina Varacalli.description: The Varacalli are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Ciminà, Calabria, Italy. They operate in the Locride area and also in Turin, where they are involved in drug trafficking. The clan was involved in the Ciminà feud from 1966, which caused about 50 deaths and extended to Turin. Some members have become pentiti (collaborators with justice).

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Varacalli.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Varacalli and Franco were allied against Barillaro-Romano-Zucco in the Ciminà feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Ciminà : a partire dal 4 giugno 1966 ... vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra.

descriptions: The Varacalli were part of the Polifroni-Franco-Varacalli-Spagnolo coalition fighting against the Barillaro-Romano-Zucco coalition in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida ha visto contrapposte da una parte le famiglie dei Barillaro-Romano-Zucco e dall'altra i Polifroni-Franco-Varacalli-Spagnolo.

descriptions: Varacalli and Polifroni were allied against Barillaro-Romano-Zucco in the Ciminà feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Ciminà : a partire dal 4 giugno 1966 ... vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra.

descriptions: The Varacalli are part of the Polifroni-Franco-Varacalli-Spagnolo coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida ha visto contrapposte da una parte le famiglie dei Barillaro-Romano-Zucco e dall'altra i Polifroni-Franco-Varacalli-Spagnolo.

descriptions: Varacalli and Spagnolo were allied against Barillaro-Romano-Zucco in the Ciminà feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Ciminà : a partire dal 4 giugno 1966 ... vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra.

descriptions: Birger and the Shelton Brothers jointly attacked the Klan.
edges.evidence_quote: Charlie Birger and the Shelton Brothers joined forces to attack the remaining Klan leaders in Herrin, using Tommy guns and shotguns.

descriptions: Birger and the Shelton Brothers Gang fought a war over bootlegging control.
edges.evidence_quote: By October 1926, the Birger and Shelton Gangs were in open conflict.

descriptions: Birger initially allied with the Shelton Brothers Gang to bootleg alcohol.
edges.evidence_quote: in 1920 he joined forces with the Shelton Brothers.

Hornec gang.description: The Hornec gang is a Gitanes criminal group from the Paris region, led by three brothers from Montreuil. It controls racketeering, drug dealing, and illegal slot machines in Paris, with connections to the Corsican mafia and Maghrebian gangs. The gang rose after the 1994 assassination of crime boss Claude Genova and became the most influential in Paris, but its influence declined after arrests in 2006.

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: The infobox lists Hornec family as an ally of Brise de Mer.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hornec family , American Mafia , Sicilian Mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Clan del Golfo , FLNC

descriptions: The Hornec brothers took over Claude Genova's operations after his death; Genova had taken over from the Zemmour brothers.
edges.evidence_quote: Claude Genova's connections and infrastructure was overtaken by the Hornec brothers in 1994.

descriptions: Indian Posse created the Indian Posse Girls as a female auxiliary.
edges.evidence_quote: The Indian Posse has created a female auxiliary, the Indian Posse Girls

descriptions: Athens Park Boys joined the Bloods alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pirus, Black P. Stones, Athens Park Boys and other gangs not aligned with the Crips often clashed with them.

descriptions: Western Ave Little Locas was a historical street click of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Western Ave Little Locas

Latella 'ndrina.description: The Latella 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta, a mafia-type organization based in Reggio Calabria, Italy. Founded in the 1980s by Pasquale Latella, it controls the Ravagnese and Croce Valanidi quarters and is allied with the Ficara, De Stefano, and Pelle 'ndrine. The clan has been involved in feuds and alliances, notably during the Second 'Ndrangheta war, and was investigated in 2013 for monopolizing the construction sector. It remains active.

descriptions: A member of the Ficara killed Vincenzo Barreca, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: sarà condannato all'ergastolo il killer Vincenzo Ficara della 'ndrina Ficara-Latella

descriptions: The Barreca allied with the Latella in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: Barreca allied with Latella in the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Barreca 'ndrina sided with the De Stefano-Tegano, Libri and Latella 'ndrine against Pasquale Condello, Diego Rosmini and Antonio Imerti.

descriptions: The Latella clan allied with the De Stefano during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: per i De Stefano capeggiati ora da Orazio , fratello di Paolo ci sono i Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Barreca , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito.

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina was allied with De Stefano in the second war.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Libri 'ndrina and Latella 'ndrina

edges.evidence_quote: In 2013, investigations discovered that the Latella 'ndrina, together with the Rosmini, Serraino, Audino, and Nicolò 'ndrine, formed an alliance to control the construction sector

Fruit Town Piru.description: The Fruit Town Piru is a set of the Piru gang alliance, part of the larger Bloods alliance, formed in the 1970s in Compton, California. Named after fruit-named streets in their neighborhood, the gang is primarily African-American and known for its rivalry with the Mob Piru Bloods. It has been involved in violent feuds and has affiliations with rappers such as Chris Brown and Soulja Boy.

'Ndrina Gallace.description: The 'Ndrina Gallace is a powerful 'Ndrangheta clan originating from Guardavalle, Italy. Over the last 30 years, it has expanded its operations across Italy, including Tuscany, Lazio, Lombardy, and Rome. The clan is heavily involved in international drug trafficking, fraud, usury, and extortion. It is allied with other 'Ndrangheta clans such as Farao-Marincola and Leuzzi.

descriptions: Novella mediated peace between Gallace and Crea di Siderno.
edges.evidence_quote: Carmelo Novella fece da paciere tra i Gallace e i Crea di Siderno invocando l'aiuto di Antonio Pelle.

descriptions: Gallace are among the major allies of Farao-Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono tra i maggiori alleati dei Farao-Marincola e delle 'ndrine sanlucote.

descriptions: Gallace sided with Loielo in the 'faida dei boschi'.
edges.evidence_quote: dall'altra Nazzareno Salvatore Emanuele, legato alla 'ndrina dei Loielo, per cui parteggiavano i Gallace.

descriptions: Gallace and Metastasio were allies against Vallelunga-Novella-Sia in the second boschi feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida dei boschi : scoppiata nel 2008 e conclusa nel 2013 ... tra i Vallelunga , Novella , Sia , Tripodi, Procopio e Lentini contro i Gallace , Ruga e Metastasio.

descriptions: Gallace and Ruga were allies against Vallelunga-Novella-Sia in the second boschi feud.

edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleate dei Leuzzi di Stignano e dei Ruga di Monasterace.

descriptions: Gallace sided against Vallelunga in the 'faida dei boschi'.

descriptions: Gallace are allied with Leuzzi di Stignano.

Zoe Pound.description: Haitian-American street gang founded in 1990 in Miami, Florida, initially as a vigilante self-defense group. Engages in drug trafficking, robbery, murder, prostitution, and racketeering. Expanded across Florida and other states, with territory reaching Virginia by 2006. A faction called ZMF was involved in the 2018 murder of XXXTentacion.

Kyosei-kai.description: The Kyosei-kai is a yakuza group based in Hiroshima, Japan, formed in May 1964 by bakuto Tatsuo Yamamura from seven yakuza clans. Known for fierce conflicts with other groups, particularly the Yamaguchi-gumi, it has been a leading member of anti-Yamaguchi federations. The group has around 120 members and is led by Susumu Arase.

descriptions: Goda-ikka and Kyosei-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai, cooperating against Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Goda-ikka has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation, the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Asano-gumi , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai .

descriptions: Kyodo-kai and Kyosei-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Kyodo-kai has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed the Gosha-kai federation with Asano-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: has formed a new anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai since 1996 with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyodo-kai , the Asano-gumi , the Goda-ikka , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai .

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed the Gosha-kai federation with Goda-ikka.

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed the Gosha-kai federation with Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyosei-kai has been in conflict with Yamaguchi-gumi since the early 1960s.
edges.evidence_quote: Notably the Kyosei-kai has been in conflict with the Yamaguchi-gumi , the largest yakuza syndicate, since the early 1960s.

edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .

Bonde dos 13.description: Brazilian criminal faction based in Acre, founded around 2013 in the Rio Branco penitentiary complex. It operates drug trafficking along the Bolivia border and is allied with the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC). Engaged in violent conflict with Comando Vermelho (CV) and rival faction Ifara for control of drug routes and territories. Present in all municipalities of Acre.

descriptions: Bonde dos 13 is in conflict with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV

descriptions: Bonde dos 13 has rivalry with Ifara.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Ifara

descriptions: Bonde dos 13 is allied with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC

Ozone Park Boys.description: The Ozone Park Boys are a Gambino crime family Mafia crew based in Ozone Park, Queens, New York City. Founded in the 1980s, they are known for a wide range of criminal activities including a $30 million-a-year sports gambling enterprise, auto theft, murder, and drug trafficking. The crew operated under Ronald Trucchio during the 1990s and remains active.

descriptions: The Ozone Park Boys is a crew operating under the Gambino family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Ozone Park Boys operate in Queens and Long Island.

descriptions: The Ozone Park Boys are a crew of the Gambino crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gambino crime family

edges.evidence_quote: the South London chapter was sponsored by the Hells Angels in Oakland

descriptions: Piromalli subdued the Priolo through homicides.
edges.evidence_quote: porta alla luce 37 omicidi i quali piegano i Versace, i Priolo e i Giuliano

X-Team.description: X-Team is a gang associated with the Bandidos Motorcycle Club, founded in Denmark in 1997 after the Nordic Biker War. Members are not required to own a motorcycle and act as a street gang recruiting young criminals to carry out crimes such as debt collection and drug dealing on behalf of the Bandidos. The gang had approximately 350 members at its peak in 2002 and operated in multiple countries. The Danish branch was eventually disbanded after the Bandidos lost control.

descriptions: Infobox lists X-Team as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brother Speed MC, Chicanos MC, Diablos MC, Mobshitters MC, Outlaws MC, Rock Machine MC, Satudarah MC, X-Team, Los Zetas

descriptions: Bandidos and X-Team members jointly charged with drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: In January 2008, two Bandidos and five X-Team members in Espoo were among twenty-one people charged with importing and distributing amphetamine.

descriptions: Bandidos are affiliated with X-Team in Norway.
edges.evidence_quote: The Norwegian Bandidos are affiliated with the Chicanos and X-Team

descriptions: X-Team is an affiliate club of Bandidos in Sweden.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliates of the Bandidos in Sweden include the Chicanos , Diablos and X-Team .

descriptions: Bandidos and X-Team members jointly committed extortion.
edges.evidence_quote: In January 2015, a total of eight people, some of whom were members of the Bandidos and X-Team, were given prison sentences of various lengths for the violent extortion of a man in Oulu that took place in July 2014.

edges.evidence_quote: Another conflict involved Original Gangsters and X-Team, a supporter club of Bandidos.

descriptions: X-Team is a support and recruitment gang for the Bandidos, carrying out crimes on their behalf.
edges.evidence_quote: X-Team is a gang associated with the Bandidos Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: X-Team member attacked a Gremium MC member, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 28 April 2012, an X-Team member used his car to force a member of the Gremium Motorcycle Club off the road near Westerkappeln.

descriptions: X-Team and Gårdstensalliansen fought over drug trade territory.
edges.evidence_quote: A struggle for control of the drug trade in the Gårdsten and Lövgärdet areas of northeast Gothenburg between X-Team and the Gårdstensalliansen (Gårdstens Alliance) gang began in August 2008.

descriptions: Mexican Team Work is a successor youth branch formed by Bandidos after X-Team disbanded in Denmark.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos later former another youth branch called Mexican Team Work.

descriptions: X-Team and Original Gangsters engaged in a violent conflict in Sweden.
edges.evidence_quote: X-Team has been involved in a conflict with the Original Gangsters (OGs) that was initiated by nightclub altercation...

descriptions: X-Team and Red & White Crew fought a gang war in Næstved and later in Gothenburg.
edges.evidence_quote: A gang war involving the X-Team and the Red & White Crew – the Hells Angels' equivalent of the X-Team – in Næstved broke out on 6 January 2002

descriptions: X-Team and Södertälje mafia fought a war over control of Södertälje's criminal market.
edges.evidence_quote: A conflict between Bernard 'Berno' Khouri, leader of the Södertälje mafia (Södertäljenätverket), and Dany Moussa, the founder of the X-Team in Södertälje, resulted in a war between the groups

Soai-kai.description: The Soai-kai is a yakuza organization based in Chiba, Japan, formed in 1945 by Toramatsu Takahashi. Originally an affiliate of the Sasada-ikka, it became independent in 1955. It is a designated yakuza group with an estimated 80 active members and is one of the three dominating yakuza groups in Chiba Prefecture.

descriptions: Soai-kai originated as an affiliate of Sasada-ikka and later became independent.
edges.evidence_quote: The Soai-kai was formed in 1945 by Toramatsu Takahashi, then a member of a Yokohama -based bakuto group named the Sasada-ikka. Originally named the "Gyosui-kai" ( 魚水会 ) as an affiliate of the Sasada-ikka, the group was renamed the "Takatora-gumi" ( 高寅組 ) and again renamed the Soai-kai in 1955 when the group became independent from the Sasada-ikka.

descriptions: Toa-kai and Soai-kai are fellow members of the Kanto Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai is a member of a bakuto fraternal federation named the Kanto Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kanto -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Matsuba-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Soai-kai is an ally of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Inagawa-kai, Soai-kai, Matsuba-kai, Kyōsei-kai, Aizukotetsu-kai, Toa-kai, Fukuhaku-kai, Gōda-ikka, Shinwa-kai

descriptions: Gente Nueva del Tigre is a faction supported by the original Gente Nueva.
edges.evidence_quote: la Gente Nueva original se mantuvo liderando a La Gente Nueva en Agua Prieta apoyando a otras facciones como Gente Nueva Salazar, Gente Nueva del Tigre, y Gente Nueva del Jaguar Arvizu, contra La Línea y contra la Gente Nueva de Los Salgueiro

descriptions: Gente Nueva del Tigre fights against La Línea.
edges.evidence_quote: la Gente Nueva original se mantuvo liderando a La Gente Nueva en Agua Prieta apoyando a otras facciones como Gente Nueva Salazar, Gente Nueva del Tigre, y Gente Nueva del Jaguar Arvizu, contra La Línea

descriptions: Gente Nueva Del Tigre is listed as an enemy of La Línea in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Gente Nueva Del Tigre

descriptions: Gente Nueva del Tigre formed after the capture of a La Línea leader, with defectors from La Línea joining Gente Nueva.
edges.evidence_quote: Con la captura de Arturo V. Terrazas, alias «El Cachorro», líder del grupo delincuencial La Línea en diciembre de 2015, originó la creación del grupo criminal "Gente Nueva del Tigre"

'Ndrina De Stefano.description: The 'Ndrina De Stefano is a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Reggio Calabria, Italy, historically considered the most influential in the city. Founded by Domenico Tripodo, it later came under the leadership of Paolo De Stefano. The clan was involved in the first and second 'Ndrangheta wars and has expanded its operations to northern Italy and abroad, engaging in drug trafficking and other illegal activities.

descriptions: De Stefano 'ndrina is a constituent family of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefano 'ndrina, from Reggio Calabria, named after De Stefano brothers, Paolo, Giovanni, Giorgio and Orazio;

descriptions: Alvaro had strong ties with Tegano for arms exchange.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel nuovo millennio con l'operazione Virus si scopre di forti legami con i Tegano per lo scambio di armi

descriptions: The Barreca allied with the De Stefano in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: The Barreca allied with the Tegano in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: Barreca allied with De Stefano-Tegano in the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Barreca 'ndrina sided with the De Stefano-Tegano, Libri and Latella 'ndrine against Pasquale Condello, Diego Rosmini and Antonio Imerti.

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina allied with De Stefano 'ndrina during the First 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: the Cataldos allied themselves with the De Stefano 'ndrina from Reggio Calabria in the First 'Ndrangheta war

descriptions: The Cataldo clan helped the De Stefano clan kill Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: Macrì was killed with the help of the Cataldo and Mazzaferro clans.

descriptions: Codispoti are allies with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: e anche con i Libri e De Stefano di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: Codispoti acted as mediators on behalf of De Stefano in the mafia war.
edges.evidence_quote: Furono da mediatori dalla parte dei De Stefano nella guerra di mafia di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: Condello killed Paolo De Stefano in retaliation for the car bomb.
edges.evidence_quote: Due giorni dopo, si scatenò l'eclatante riposta con il duplice omicidio di don Paolino De Stefano e dell'autista Antonio Pellicanò, di cui Condello e il fratello Domenico furono esecutori.

descriptions: D'Agostino are allies of De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei De Stefano e dei Bellocco

descriptions: De Stefano is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The De Stefano 'ndrina ... is one of the most powerful clans of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: The Barreca clan allied with the De Stefano during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: per i De Stefano capeggiati ora da Orazio , fratello di Paolo ci sono i Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Barreca , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito.

descriptions: Cataldo members were among the mandanti (instigators) of Macrì's murder, acting with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: i mandanti furono Paolo De Stefano, Vincenzo, Giuseppe e Francesco Mazzaferro, Giuseppe e Nicola Cataldo

descriptions: De Stefano fought Condello in the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: La risposta non si fece attendere: 2 giorni dopo, il 13 ottobre 1985 avviene il duplice omicidio del boss Paolo De Stefano e l'autista Antonio Pellicanò dagli Imerti che prima del fatto sancirono un'alleanza tramite il matrimonio del capobastone Antonio Imerti e Giuseppina Condello appartenente all'omonima 'ndrina scoppia la seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta .

descriptions: De Stefano fought against Condello-Imerti alliance in second war.
edges.evidence_quote: The bloody six-year war between the Condello -Imerti clan and De Stefano allied with the Tegano clan caused 621 deaths.

descriptions: Condello were underbosses of De Stefano before the war.
edges.evidence_quote: A second 'Ndrangheta war was triggered by the marriage between Giuseppina Condello – the sister of the Condello brothers, underbosses of De Stefano – and Antonio Imerti

descriptions: Franco-Murina is a splinter of Tegano.
edges.evidence_quote: Operazione TNT 2 , inizio 2015: otto arresti nella cosca Franco-Murina, costola dei Tegano, per associazione a delinquere di stampo mafioso , traffico di esplosivo e droga .

descriptions: De Stefano and Imerti are in a faida (conflict).
edges.evidence_quote: viene ucciso Emanuele Quattrone (mandato dai De Stefano per proteggerlo dalla faida con gli Imerti)

descriptions: De Stefano attacked Imerti with a car bomb.
edges.evidence_quote: L'11 ottobre 1985, i De Stefano, temendo una destabilizzazione di potere, commissionarono l'autobomba contro Antonio Imerti in cui i 3 guardaspalle restarono ammazzati mentre Imerti sopravvisse.

descriptions: The De Stefano and Imerti clans were the main opposing factions in the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: L'inizio della guerra scoppia nella città di Reggio Calabria dove nascono dei problemi tra gli Imerti e i De Stefano perché i De Stefano volevano espandere il loro potere fino a Villa San Giovanni , territorio degli Imerti .

descriptions: De Stefano fought against Condello-Imerti alliance in second war.
edges.evidence_quote: The bloody six-year war between the Condello -Imerti clan and De Stefano allied with the Tegano clan caused 621 deaths.

descriptions: De Stefano and Imerti fought a war, with De Stefano attacking Imerti and Imerti retaliating by killing Paolo De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: le tensioni scoppiarono l'11 ottobre 1985 quando i De Stefano piazzarono un'autobomba contro Imerti chi sopravvisse ma 3 guardaspalle restarono ammazzati. Appena 48 ore dopo l'autobomba, Imerti rispose con il duplice omicidio di Paolo De Stefano e l'autista Antonio Pellicanò.

descriptions: De Stefano and Imerti were in conflict in the Second war of 'ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta : Combattuta tra il 1985 e il 1991, nacque nella città di Reggio Calabria ... La faida cominciò per tensioni tra Paolo De Stefano e Antonio Imerti

descriptions: De Stefano clan attacked Imerti with a car bomb.
edges.evidence_quote: l'11 ottobre 1985 piazzarono un'autobomba contro Nino Imerti

descriptions: Nirta helped De Stefano establish peace.
edges.evidence_quote: Orazio De Stefano riesce a ristabilire la pax mafiosa grazie all'intervento della cosca "amica" dei Nirta (La Maggiore) di San Luca.

descriptions: Tegano and Labate are mentioned together as allied in arrests.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 aprile 2011 vengono arrestate, durante l'operazione Archi 21 persone presunte affiliate alle cosche Tegano e Labate , tra cui Giuseppe e Bruno Tegano, fratelli di Giovanni Tegano, ne mancano all'appello 5 tra cui il capo dei Labate : Pietro Labate , uscito dal carcere solo un anno prima .

descriptions: De Stefano and Libri are mentioned together as allied in arrests.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 23 giugno 2010 i Carabinieri compiono 42 arresti in Lombardia , Friuli-Venezia Giulia ed Emilia-Romagna nei confronti di presunti esponenti dei Condello , e dei De Stefano- Libri , accusati di associazione mafiosa ed estorsione.

descriptions: The Libri clan allied with the De Stefano during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: per i De Stefano capeggiati ora da Orazio , fratello di Paolo ci sono i Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Barreca , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito.

descriptions: Libri 'ndrina was allied with De Stefano in the second war.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Libri 'ndrina and Latella 'ndrina

descriptions: Mammoliti supported De Stefano against Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefanos won a monopoly ... with the support of the Piromalli and Mammoliti 'ndrine

descriptions: The Mammoliti cosca supported the De Stefano clan in the aftermath of the war.
edges.evidence_quote: They won a monopoly of construction work in northern Reggio Calabria, moving the rival Tripodo group out of the market of public work contracts with the support of the Piromalli and Mammoliti cosche.

descriptions: Mammoliti supported the new faction alongside De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: la posizione di Piromalli venne appoggiata dalle nuove leve, come i De Stefano di Reggio Calabria, ma anche dai Mammoliti

descriptions: Mazzaferro members were among the mandanti of Macrì's murder, acting with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: i mandanti furono Paolo De Stefano, Vincenzo, Giuseppe e Francesco Mazzaferro, Giuseppe e Nicola Cataldo

descriptions: The Paviglianiti clan allied with the De Stefano during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: per i De Stefano capeggiati ora da Orazio , fratello di Paolo ci sono i Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Barreca , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito.

descriptions: De Stefano clashed with Piromalli over port control.
edges.evidence_quote: Lo scontro con la famiglia Piromalli , che di fatto monopolizzava il porto, ha causato l'omicidio perpetrato dagli Imerti nei confronti di Paolo De Stefano.

descriptions: Piromalli killed De Stefano boss Giorgio, starting conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1977 disagreements about business interests emerged between Piromalli and the De Stefano clan. A hit squad headed by Giuseppe 'Peppe' Piromalli killed Giorgio De Stefano.

descriptions: Piromalli ordered the killing of Giorgio De Stefano, indicating conflict between the two groups.
edges.evidence_quote: He was killed by Giuseppe Suraci, apparently out of personal vengeance, but in reality on the orders of Piromalli, who feared the rise of the De Stefanos.

descriptions: Rosmini 'ndrina was a rival in the second war.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Condello , Imerti , Serraino 'ndrina and Rosmini 'ndrina

descriptions: Serraino 'ndrina was a rival in the second war.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Condello , Imerti , Serraino 'ndrina and Rosmini 'ndrina

descriptions: De Stefano and Tripodo fought in the first 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 1974 e 1976 scoppia una faida interna tra Paolo De Stefano e Mico Tripodo, che scaturirà nella prima guerra di 'ndrangheta , che vedrà il secondo schieramento come perdente.

descriptions: De Stefano killed Tripodo during the first 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: poi i De Stefano reagiscono uccidendo i vecchi capi Macrì e Tripodo annientando così la vecchia guardia

descriptions: The Tripodo group attacked the De Stefano clan, starting the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Tripodo tried to strike first, killing Giovanni De Stefano and wounding his brother Giorgio De Stefano on 24 November 1974, in the Roof Garden bar, an infamous 'Ndrangheta haunt in Reggio Calabria.

descriptions: De Stefano saw Tripodo as an obstacle and eventually had him killed.
edges.evidence_quote: I De Stefano scalpitavano per emergere nel panorama 'ndranghetista e vedevano la presenza di don Mico Tripodo a Reggio Calabria come un freno alla loro crescita criminale.

descriptions: Tripodo attacked De Stefano, starting the first 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: The war started with an attack on the brothers Giorgio, Paolo and Giovanni De Stefano ... ordered by Tripodo.

descriptions: De Stefano is linked to Tripodo family.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina De Stefano è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Reggio Calabria legata alle famiglie Tegano e Tripodo.

descriptions: The De Stefano 'ndrina is linked to the Tripodo family.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina De Stefano è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Reggio Calabria legata alle famiglie Tegano e Tripodo.

descriptions: De Stefano brothers were originally members of Tripodo's clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The De Stefano brothers ... would come to prominence as members of the 'Ndrangheta clan of Domenico Tripodo

descriptions: The Zito clan allied with the De Stefano during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: per i De Stefano capeggiati ora da Orazio , fratello di Paolo ci sono i Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Barreca , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito.

descriptions: De Stefano member Giorgio had contacts with Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: From his law office in Rome, he also had contacts with the Banda della Magliana.

descriptions: The De Stefano 'ndrina was allied with a boss of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Era alleato con i boss delle altre organizzazioni criminali italiane, come Leoluca Bagarella e Nitto Santapaola della mafia siciliana, e Raffaele Cutolo della camorra.

descriptions: De Stefano had joint ventures with Camorra boss Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefanos were the representation of the manager-criminal controlling a crime multinational with joint ventures with Raffaele Cutolo from the Camorra

descriptions: De Stefano killed Macrì during the first 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: poi i De Stefano reagiscono uccidendo i vecchi capi Macrì e Tripodo annientando così la vecchia guardia

descriptions: De Stefano and Macrì were in conflict, with attacks on both sides.
edges.evidence_quote: il 24 novembre del 1974 un commando fece irruzione nel bar Roof Garden sul lungomare di Reggio Calabria uccidendo Giovanni De Stefano e ferendo Giorgio De Stefano capo della 'ndrina; l'anno seguente, esattamente il 20 gennaio 1975, viene ucciso da un commando don Antonio Macrì

descriptions: Macrì was a rival in the first war.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: First 'Ndrangheta war (1974-76): Domenico Tripodo and Antonio Macrì

descriptions: The Latella clan allied with the De Stefano during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: per i De Stefano capeggiati ora da Orazio , fratello di Paolo ci sono i Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Barreca , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito.

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina was allied with De Stefano in the second war.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Libri 'ndrina and Latella 'ndrina

descriptions: De Stefano used NCO to kill Tripodo; they worked together in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Domenico Tripodo fu arrestato il 21 febbraio 1975 e incarcerato alla prigione di Poggioreale a Napoli e fu ucciso il 26 agosto 1976 in cella su richiesta di Paolo De Stefano dalla Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo che lavorava con loro nel traffico di droga.

descriptions: De Stefano 'ndrina and Nuova Camorra Organizzata cooperated in drug trafficking and a murder.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 August 1976, Domenico Tripodo , a powerful 'Ndrangheta boss of the time, was stabbed to death in prison on the request of the De Stefano 'ndrina , and with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo , the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefano's in drug trafficking.

descriptions: NCO cooperated with De Stefano in drug trafficking and helped kill Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: Tripodo was killed with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo , the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefano’s in drug trafficking.

descriptions: The De Stefano clan cooperated with the NCO to kill Tripodo and in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 August 1976, he was stabbed to death in prison on the request of the De Stefanos with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo, the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefanos in drug trafficking.

descriptions: De Stefano paid Cutolo's NCO to assassinate Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: Il capoclan Tripodo venne ucciso il 26 agosto 1976 dentro il carcere di Poggioreale in Campania da "soldati" della nuova camorra organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo; quest'ultimo fu pagato 100 milioni di lire dai De Stefano

descriptions: De Stefano allied with Tegano through marriage during second war.
edges.evidence_quote: the wedding sealed the alliance between the De Stefanos and the powerful Tegano clan.

descriptions: The 'ndrina of Franco Coco Trovato is allied with the De Stefano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: alleato dei De Stefano di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: De Stefano attempted to kill Antonio Imerti; Imerti retaliated by killing Paolo De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: L'11 ottobre 1985 avviene il tentato omicidio di Antonio Imerti da un'autobomba per volontà dei De Stefano . Due giorni dopo gli Imerti rispondo con l'omicidio del boss Paolo De Stefano .

descriptions: The Labate 'ndrina is allied with the Tegano 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei Tegano

descriptions: Libri is allied with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: I Libri sono una 'ndrina tra le più potenti di tutta Reggio Calabria alleata dei De Stefano , dei Condello e dei Tegano .

descriptions: Libri is allied with Tegano.
edges.evidence_quote: I Libri sono una 'ndrina tra le più potenti di tutta Reggio Calabria alleata dei De Stefano , dei Condello e dei Tegano .

descriptions: Libri 'ndrina and De Stefano 'ndrina are historically allied.
edges.evidence_quote: The Libri 'ndrina is historically allied to the De Stefano-Tegano 'ndrina

descriptions: Mammoliti and Piromalli ordered the killing of Giorgio De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: a decretarne l'eliminazione furono le cosche Piromalli e Mammoliti

descriptions: The Mancuso and De Stefano discussed Cosa Nostra's proposal; Mancuso rejected it.
edges.evidence_quote: tale richiesta venne discussa da Giuseppe De Stefano e respinta dal potente Boss (Luigi Mancuso) di Limbadi

descriptions: The Mazzaferro clan helped the De Stefano clan kill Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: Macrì was killed with the help of the Cataldo and Mazzaferro clans.

descriptions: Paviglianiti allied with De Stefano during the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Durante la seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta erano a fianco dei De Stefano.

descriptions: Piromalli and De Stefano were in conflict during the First 'Ndrangheta War.
edges.evidence_quote: conflicts over business interests arose between Piromalli and the De Stefano clan, contributing to the First 'Ndrangheta War

descriptions: Piromalli and Mammoliti ordered the killing of Giorgio De Stefano to prevent him from becoming supreme boss.
edges.evidence_quote: a decretarne l'eliminazione furono le cosche Piromalli e Mammoliti

descriptions: Rosmini is currently very close to the De Stefano family.
edges.evidence_quote: La famiglia Rosmini attualmente sembra essere molto legata alla famiglia De Stefano.

descriptions: The Serraino were enemies of the De Stefano, plotting to kill their boss.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo periodo storico ci fu un'alleanza tra la famiglia Serraino e la famiglia Piromalli per progettare l'uccisione De Stefano.

descriptions: The Trovato have a familial link with the De Stefano-Tegano.
edges.evidence_quote: e hanno anche un legame parentale con i De Stefano-Tegano

descriptions: The Valle clan is linked to the De Stefano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: legati ai De Stefano

descriptions: During the first 'ndrangheta war in the 1970s, the Valle clan sided with the De Stefano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: erano schierati con i De Stefano

descriptions: The Caligiuri collaborated with the De Stefano-Tegano in the murder of Giovanni Santoro.
edges.evidence_quote: cominciarono con l'assassinio del boss cirotano Giovanni Santoro detto " fortezza " ammazzato con 15 colpi di pistola a Cirò Marina il 30 agosto del 1977 con la collaborazione dei De Stefano-Tegano .

descriptions: Condello-Rosmini-Imerti seceded from and fought against the De Stefano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Lo scontro inizia nel 1985 con la secessione dei Condello- Rosmini - Imerti dal clan De Stefano

descriptions: Latella-Ficara collaborates with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaborazione con i De Stefano e i Pelle

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina collaborates with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaboration with the De Stefano and Pelle 'ndrina

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina allied with De Stefano-Tegano during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Latella 'ndrina joined the alliance with the De Stefano-Tegano

descriptions: NCO had relations with the De Stefano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo stringe i rapporti con la ' Ndrangheta , in particolare con le cosche Piromalli , De Stefano e Mammoliti .

Menace of Destruction.description: Menace of Destruction (MOD) is a Hmong street gang founded in 1988 in Fresno, California. Originally called Masters of Destruction, it is one of the oldest active Asian street gangs in Northern California and the largest Hmong gang in the United States. The gang is involved in murders, shootings, drug trafficking (marijuana and methamphetamine), and weapon trafficking. It is active in California, the Midwestern United States, and other areas with large Hmong communities.

descriptions: Menace of Destruction is listed as an ally of Asian Boyz in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Crips, Menace of Destruction

descriptions: Big Circle Gang lists Menace of Destruction as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: The Company, American Mafia, Red Wa, Fujian gangs, Wo Shing Wo, Menace of Destruction, Asian Boyz, MS-13, Netas

descriptions: Infobox lists Menace of Destruction as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Menace of Destruction

descriptions: MOD was in dispute with Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the M.O.D was involved in a dispute with two other gangs; the Laotian Posse and the Alliance.

descriptions: MOD and Asian Crips were in a turf war.
edges.evidence_quote: M.O.D. and other Hmong gangs such as Asian Crips were involved in a turf war with each other, which resulted in more than 120 shootings in the area.

descriptions: MOD and Asian Family Gangsters were in conflict, with MOD retaliating with a drive-by shooting.
edges.evidence_quote: tensions between the Menace of Destruction and the Asian Family Gangsters were intense. Following the death of a young M.O.D gang member and a shooting at several Tiny Little Rascals; a junior version of M.O.D, the M.O.D retaliated by performing a drive-by shooting in North Sacramento Asian Family Gangsters' turf, killing a rival gang member.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Alliance, Asian Crips, Asian Family Gangsters, Fresno Bulldogs, Hmong Nation Society, Junior Criminal Crips, Laotian Posse, Oriental Ruthless Boys, Oroville Mono Boys, Ruthless Crip Gangsters, Tiny Rascal Gang

descriptions: La Familia and MOD cooperated in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: The cartel La Familia smuggled millions of dollars' worth of methamphetamine from Mexico to Minnesota. The drugs then went through a local member of the cartel and the Menace of Destruction gang.

descriptions: MOD was in dispute with Laotian Posse.
edges.evidence_quote: the M.O.D was involved in a dispute with two other gangs; the Laotian Posse and the Alliance.

descriptions: MOD and MBS are rival gangs that formed from the breakup of Peace MOD.
edges.evidence_quote: the breakup of "Peace MOD" created rivalries between all three of them.

descriptions: MOD and ORB are rival gangs that formed from the breakup of Peace MOD.
edges.evidence_quote: the breakup of "Peace MOD" created rivalries between all three of them.

descriptions: Oroville Mono Boys is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Alliance, Asian Crips, Asian Family Gangsters, Fresno Bulldogs, Hmong Nation Society, Junior Criminal Crips, Laotian Posse, Oriental Ruthless Boys, Oroville Mono Boys, Ruthless Crip Gangsters, Tiny Rascal Gang

descriptions: MOD splintered from Peace MOD.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1988, a handful of Hmong youth broke off from one of the first Hmong gangs in California known as "Peace MOD", originally formed in 1985 in Fresno, California to combat other gangs preying upon the Hmong community. The splinter group formed the "Masters of Destruction" (MOD).

descriptions: Ruthless Crip Gangsters shot at a MOD member's home.
edges.evidence_quote: Several members of the Ruthless Crip Gangsters drove to the Eau Claire home of a member of the gang Menace of Destruction. Three to five shots were fired at a man after a verbal confrontation, one shot narrowly missing his head.

descriptions: Tiny Little Rascals is listed as an ally of MOD in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tiny Little Rascals

descriptions: MOD had a turf war with Tiny Rascal Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: M.O.D members were migrating to the Midwestern states while having a turf war with Tiny Rascal Gang in Fresno, California.

descriptions: MOD overtook the White Tigers.
edges.evidence_quote: one of Minnesota's first Hmong gang known as the White Tigers was eventually overtaken by MOD's presence in the Twin Cities.

descriptions: Papi operated under Mazzarella's permission and supply conditions.
edges.evidence_quote: A Carriera Grande alla famiglia Papi era consentito trafficare in droga con la pretesa dei Mazzarella di essere riforniti oppure, nei casi in cui i Mazzarella disponevano di grossi quantitativi di droga procurati attraverso le loro fonti, i Papi erano costretti ad acquistarla in parte.
